title: Founder Recovery in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger founder recovery in practice judgment so founder performance work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Founder Recovery in Practice is a leverage point inside founder performance. It supports the broader goal of decision-making, time allocation, energy management, and resilience.
coreConcepts: Founder Recovery in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good founder recovery in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Founder Recovery in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
